name: Mitie Group PLC
description: Mitie Group PLC is a leading British strategic outsourcing and facilities management company. Founded in 1987, the firm provides a comprehensive range of specialist services, including engineering maintenance, security, cleaning, catering, landscaping, and energy consultancy. Operating primarily in the United Kingdom, Mitie focuses on technology-led facilities transformation to support diverse public and private sector clients. With a workforce of over 50,000 employees, the company delivers innovative, sustainable solutions designed to enhance workplace environments, improve operational efficiency, and provide essential infrastructure support across various industries and communities nationwide.
